# CMakeLists.txt
#
# Build configuration for Slate - A clean slate for web browsing.
# Requires Qt 6.x with WebEngineWidgets component.

cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.16)

# Read version from VERSION.txt (single source of truth)
file(READ "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/VERSION.txt" SLATE_VERSION)
string(STRIP "${SLATE_VERSION}" SLATE_VERSION)
project(Slate VERSION ${SLATE_VERSION} LANGUAGES CXX)

# Require C++17 for modern features
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 17)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED ON)

# Qt6 requires this for autogenerated MOC/UIC/RCC files
set(CMAKE_AUTOMOC ON)
set(CMAKE_AUTORCC ON)
set(CMAKE_AUTOUIC ON)

# Find Qt6 packages
find_package(Qt6 REQUIRED COMPONENTS Widgets WebEngineWidgets WebEngineQuick)

# Define the executable
set(SLATE_SOURCES
    src/Main.cpp
    src/MainWindow.cpp
    src/MainWindow.h
    src/AddressBar.cpp
    src/AddressBar.h
    src/AdBlocker.cpp
    src/AdBlocker.h
    src/resources.qrc
)

# Add Windows application icon
if(WIN32)
    list(APPEND SLATE_SOURCES src/slate.rc)
endif()

add_executable(Slate ${SLATE_SOURCES})

# Generate a version header from CMake project version
configure_file(
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_SOURCE_DIR}/src/Version.h.in"
    "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/generated/Version.h"
    @ONLY
)
target_include_directories(Slate PRIVATE "${CMAKE_CURRENT_BINARY_DIR}/generated")

# Link against Qt libraries
target_link_libraries(Slate PRIVATE
    Qt6::Widgets
    Qt6::WebEngineWidgets
    Qt6::WebEngineQuick
)

# On Windows, prevent console window from appearing alongside GUI
if(WIN32)
    set_target_properties(Slate PROPERTIES
        WIN32_EXECUTABLE TRUE
    )
endif()
